patterns.description: Core router modules (run.py, lane_policy.py, resolve.py, model_registry.py) are accessed in many sessions, indicating they are a central bottleneck.
patterns.recommendation: Extract shared dispatch logic into reusable utilities, add caching, and enforce strict interface versioning to reduce direct coupling.

patterns.description: Configuration files, especially .oneshot/config/models.yaml, are edited in a large number of sessions, risking configuration drift and inconsistencies.
patterns.recommendation: Externalize configuration to a version‑controlled schema, add automated validation, and centralize access via a config service.

patterns.description: Delegation‑enforcement.md, DELEGATION_MODEL.md, WORKER_LANES.md, and routing.md are repeatedly consulted, suggesting unclear or fragmented policies.
patterns.recommendation: Consolidate all delegation and routing policies into a single authoritative document, add examples, and enforce via code reviews and linters.

patterns.description: oneshot_cli/tasks.py is accessed in 17 sessions, indicating it may be a focal point for command execution.
patterns.recommendation: Refactor tasks.py into modular command modules with lazy loading, and add unit tests for each command path.

patterns.description: Various SKILL.md files (conduct, research, shared) are accessed moderately (3‑8 sessions), indicating potential gaps in onboarding or knowledge sharing.
patterns.recommendation: Standardize skill documentation templates, add a onboarding checklist, and integrate documentation checks into CI.
